spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates per-field autocorrect choices across inputs, textarea prose, and a contenteditable code editor host.

interactive.rationale: Real form controls plus an editable contenteditable code surface are captured by the submit demo.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb on the feature index closely matches what the concept page delivers — title, lede, and interactive surface line up.

edge_cases.rationale: Technical precision fields now include a contenteditable editor surface with autocorrect disabled, covering the supported host type called out by the spec.

references.rationale: Cites the chromestatus.com/feature link in the see-also section as the design system requires.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex creeping in, button colours and contrast appear within AA.

summary: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp on localhost:3000: the contenteditable code editor has autocorrect="off", accepts edited code, and the submit path includes the Code editor value in the form-values alert alongside the other fields.
